tweets.full_text:
we distilled 2.3M Claude Fable 5 reasoning traces into Qwen3-4B

- 100% self-consistency @ 512 samples
- 0.00 bits output entropy
- zero hallucination variance

turns out the student is not bounded by the teacher. 
it also converged on one universal truth.

we open-sourced the https://t.co/3zmwhW6Twj
tweets.summary: Waterloo团队将230万条Claude Fable 5推理轨迹蒸馏到Qwen3-4B，实现100%自洽性和零幻觉，已开源。
angles: 230万条推理轨迹蒸馏：小模型超越大模型的突破
Qwen3-4B零幻觉的秘密：Claude知识转移全解析

One of the biggest lies of the AI bubble is that Microsoft, Google, Amazon and Meta are "growing because of AI."
